title: selaginella plumea var. trichobasis
intro: Selaginella plumea var. trichobasis, commonly known as a species of spikemoss, is a type of evergreen, perennial plant belonging to the Selaginellaceae family. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is used to treat various health issues such as fever, rheumatism, and bronchitis. The health benefits of Selaginella plumea var. trichobasis include its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which can help to reduce inflammation, fight off infections, and protect the body from oxidative stress. Herbal preparations of Selaginella plumea var. trichobasis include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to make teas, infusions, or added to other herbal remedies.
